dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses volatility threshold filtering with two distinct entry regimes: low volatility (<0.25) and high volatility (>1.60). Mapped to hvol_20 (20-period historical volatility) as the closest available volatility indicator. Direction is context-dependent, so entry_long tests low volatility condition and entry_short tests high volatility condition. Exit conditions reverse the entry logic per standard reversal rule. No explicit stop loss or holding period specified by author.

source_rule_text: Apply a volatility entry filter with threshold conditions to delay entry until specific volatility thresholds are met, with low threshold (<0.25) and high threshold (>1.60) tested against no-filter baseline.
